summary: Iteration 2 backend + frontend testing complete. All 19 backend pytest cases pass (added 7 new tests for dashboard period filter day/week/month/year, product stock field, customer account_balance, note customer_account_balance). Frontend Playwright covered: Dashboard period toggle (Dia/Semana/Mês/Ano) with chart updates, all 4 stat cards are <a> Links to /notas, all 3 shortcuts navigate to /notas/nova, /produtos, /clientes. Products page has Estoque column with colored badges (red=0, emerald=>=5) and product-stock-input. Customers page has Contas column and customer-account-balance-input. Note Editor: customer-select auto-fills note-customer-account-balance when customer.account_balance>0 (verified with 120.50). Live preview shows 'Contas em aberto' line and adjusted total. NotePrintPage default = thermal (58mm-wide ~219px container monospace), layout-thermal-btn / layout-a4-btn toggle works, both layouts render order/customer/total testids and conditionally show contas section: when customer_account_balance>0 -> shows CONTAS EM ABERTO + Débito Anterior + TOTAL GERAL = 35+120.50=155.50; when 0 -> no contas section. NEITHER layout shows tier badges (Linha Azul/Verde/Amarela/Vermelha) - all confirmed absent. Editor preview still shows tier badges as required.

issues: Recharts emits 'width(-1) and height(-1)' warning during mount on initial load - cosmetic, chart eventually renders correctly. Could add minHeight to ResponsiveContainer parent to suppress.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py dashboard_stats datetime.fromisoformat parsing: works for the ISO timestamps written by the app, but if a note has tz-aware vs tz-naive mixed format the .date() comparison with today_dt (date) is correct. Acceptable.

generate_order_number race condition still present (count-based). Concurrent note creation could yield duplicate order_numbers. Consider a unique compound index on (user_id, order_number) or atomic counter collection.
CORS_ORIGINS='*' with allow_credentials=True still misconfigured per spec - unchanged from iteration 1.

ProductIn / CustomerIn / NoteIn now have new fields (stock, account_balance, customer_account_balance) with sane defaults; backward compatible with existing docs (missing field returns default 0 from Pydantic on read since the doc is deserialized via Mongo, but returned dict may lack the field for legacy records - confirmed default 0 is applied during create/update flow). Consider a one-time migration to backfill the field on existing notes/products/customers if absent.
seed_data_creation: Tests create/cleanup TEST_-prefixed products, customers, notes during pytest. Frontend test left a few TEST_ rows (TEST_BalCustomer, TEST_StockItem, TEST_NoBalance note) in the admin tenant DB - safe to leave or main agent can clean up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers all auth, CRUD, multi-tenant, dashboard (incl. period=day/week/month/year), product.stock, customer.account_balance, note.customer_account_balance. Frontend testids confirmed: period-day/week/month/year, stat-orders/revenue/pending/total-notes (all <a href='/notas'>), shortcut-new-note/products/customers, product-stock-input, customer-account-balance-input, note-customer-account-balance, layout-thermal-btn/layout-a4-btn (thermal default), thermal-order-number/customer-name/total/account-balance, print-order-number/customer-name/total/account-balance. NO tier badges in either print receipt; tier badges still present in editor preview as expected. Default thermal width ~219px (58mm at 96dpi).
